reasoning_content:
Now I need to update the main.cpp file to:
1. Add all the token mappings
2. Implement proper location tracking (file name, line, column)
3. Implement StartOfLine and LeadingSpace detection

Let me update the main.cpp file.

action.old_str:
// 映射定义，将ANTLR的tokenTypeName映射到clang的格式
std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> tokenTypeMapping = {
  { "Int", "int" },
  { "Identifier", "identifier" },
  { "LeftParen", "l_paren" },
  { "RightParen", "r_paren" },
  { "RightBrace", "r_brace" },
  { "LeftBrace", "l_brace" },
  { "LeftBracket", "l_square" },
  { "RightBracket", "r_square" },
  { "Constant", "numeric_constant" },
  { "Return", "return" },
  { "Semi", "semi" },
  { "EOF", "eof" },
  { "Equal", "equal" },
  { "Plus", "plus" },
  { "Comma", "comma" },

  // 在这里继续添加其他映射
};
